findings.summary: _requeue_for_ocr calls update_document_metadata without PAPERLESS_CALL_EXCEPTIONS guard, unlike all peer tag operations.
evidence: _requeue_for_ocr line 205: update_document_metadata without try/except, while finalize_document_with_error and release_processing_tag both use PAPERLESS_CALL_EXCEPTIONS guards
findings.suggestion: Wrap the update call with try/except PAPERLESS_CALL_EXCEPTIONS consistent with peer functions.

findings.summary: claim_processing_tag performs a non-atomic read-modify-write-verify without documenting the race window.
evidence: Check tag_id not in tags, update, then verify - race between check and update
findings.suggestion: Add inline comment documenting the race window and that verify-after-write provides best-effort protection.

findings.summary: test_empty_content_requeues verifies PRE_TAG_ID is present but does not assert other pipeline tags were removed by clean_pipeline_tags.
evidence: Only asserts 443 in tags, does not verify classify pipeline tags are absent
findings.suggestion: Add assertions that CLASSIFY_PRE_TAG_ID and processing tags are not in the resulting tag set.

findings.summary: common.config imports REFUSAL_PHRASES from common.constants for OCR_REFUSAL_MARKERS default.
findings.suggestion: Move refusal phrase defaults to the OCR package or make purely configurable via env vars.

findings.summary: OcrProcessor uses abbreviated form while ClassificationProcessor uses the full noun, creating asymmetric naming.
findings.suggestion: Both names are clear; document the naming convention or accept the asymmetry.

findings.summary: Three module-level functions delegate to _openai_holder methods with no added logic.
evidence: init_openai_client, get_openai_client, is_openai_client_ready are one-line pass-throughs
findings.suggestion: The functions provide a stable public API; the indirection is minimal but could be simplified.

findings.summary: Both httpx and openai SDK bundle httpx internally, creating implicit version coupling.
Two pragma: no cover AssertionError guards on provably unreachable paths add defensive noise.
evidence: raise AssertionError in both files after for-loops that always return/raise on last iteration
findings.suggestion: Remove unreachable guards or replace with typing.assert_never.

findings.summary: classifier.quality_gates imports REFUSAL_PHRASES from common.constants directly.
findings.suggestion: Receive refusal phrases via Settings or a classifier-local constant.

findings.summary: OcrProcessor and ClassificationProcessor share identical claim/release/stats orchestration but no base class.
evidence: Both: init, process() with claim/finally/release/log-stats pattern
findings.suggestion: The duplication is acceptable for two classes; extracting a base would add abstraction without reducing complexity.

findings.summary: TaxonomyCache._get_or_create_item_id calls refresh() inside the RLock, performing HTTP calls while holding the lock.
evidence: with self._lock: ... self.refresh() makes three API calls
findings.suggestion: Document the locking behavior or release the lock before refresh.

findings.summary: truncate_content_by_pages includes preamble text before the first page header without counting it as a page.
